body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
This PR does a lot of small changes (many of which came up when calibrating the model with the new IC, with the global box domain, etc):
- adds the saturated land IC set. This differs from our current IC set in a number of ways: it was generated with zero flux at the bottom of the domain, the soil depth is 15 instead of 50 m, and it containts the leaf water potential.
- Users can change which IC set they want by passing in the correct path. By creating the `enforce_constraints` argument, the current behavior is preserved if they pass the old path, set enforce_constraints to true, change the soil BC (now exposed via kwarg), and change the domain depth to 50 m.
- Fixed a bug in the HybridBox where the Plane created did not receive the correct context.
- make it so we do not assume atmos.T is a PrescribedAtmosphere when setting IC
- saturated IC are now the default in Simulations
- Fixes a bug with the calibration scripts to make it work with spherical domains (two element nelements Tuple) and boxes (three element nelements Tuple)
- Makes the default land model in calibration the pmodel

I'm not sure we really need to preserve all of the old IC machinery, but for now it makes sense, I think, in case we want to switch between them

## To-do
Run long runs before merging


## Content
<!---  specific tasks that are currently complete 
- Solution implemented
-->

title: Expand IC set
